title: Etsan's Cobblemon Dreams Hotbar
description:
This pack only changes the hotbar and nothing else, this is merely an addon pack to the base game. This is 100% complete unless I feel that there needs to be a change or an addition to better improve the hotbar and I am open to suggestions :) 
1.21 ready!
body:
This is an alternative version of my better hotbar made for the Cobblemon Dreams server. It is ready for cobblemon 1.6 (I do not recommend using this on cobblemon 1.5.2 or below).


This pack only changes the hotbar and nothing else, this is merely an addon pack to the base game. This hotbar aims to be have very little intrusion on the screen and increase visibility. This is 100% complete unless I feel that there needs to be a change or an addition to better improve the hotbar and I am open to suggestions :)

The pack is 1.21 ready!

This resource pack is not to be redistributed, reuploaded or ported by another party.

Included Apple Skin Support!![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf9d254078fea67ec63d181302cdfe1d0c4ab9b3_0.webp)
